MaxLineLength:CardMarketProductMapper.kt:CardMarketProductMapper$// we want the genre (Pokemon), the type (Singles) , the set (Evolving-Skies) and the last segment (e.g. "Pikachu-V1-EVS049").
MaxLineLength:CardMarketProductMapper.kt:CardMarketProductMapper$set = ProductSet(setId = 0, cmCode = detailsDto.set.code, names = mapOf(detailsDto.name.languageCode to detailsDto.set.name))
